creator: spam@rm-rf.kiev.ua
text:
Hi, David

If You have some free time, can You please review this pr again?

As I already said, the patch is correct, libintl linked to the vim
binary because of the default gtk GUI, which brings bsd.gnome.mk,
which unconditionally add libintl dependency.

default:
$ldd vim
vim:
        libXt.so.6 => /usr/local/lib/libXt.so.6 (0x4825a000)
        libgtk-x11-2.0.so.0 => not found (0x0)
        libgdk-x11-2.0.so.0 => not found (0x0)
        libgdk_pixbuf-2.0.so.0 => not found (0x0)
        libX11.so.6 => /usr/local/lib/libX11.so.6 (0x482a7000)
        libpango-1.0.so.0 => not found (0x0)
        libm.so.5 => /lib/libm.so.5 (0x483bb000)
        libgobject-2.0.so.0 => /usr/local/lib/libgobject-2.0.so.0 (0x483d4000)
        libglib-2.0.so.0 => /usr/local/lib/libglib-2.0.so.0 (0x48415000)
        libSM.so.6 => /usr/local/lib/libSM.so.6 (0x484e7000)
        libICE.so.6 => /usr/local/lib/libICE.so.6 (0x484ef000)
        libncurses.so.8 => /lib/libncurses.so.8 (0x48506000)
        libiconv.so.3 => /usr/local/lib/libiconv.so.3 (0x48544000)
        libintl.so.9 => /usr/local/lib/libintl.so.9 (0x48622000)
        libperl.so => not found (0x0)
        libpython2.7.so => not found (0x0)
        libtcl85.so.1 => not found (0x0)
        libthr.so.3 => /lib/libthr.so.3 (0x4862b000)
        libc.so.7 => /lib/libc.so.7 (0x4863f000)
        libxcb.so.2 => /usr/local/lib/libxcb.so.2 (0x48749000)
        libXau.so.6 => /usr/local/lib/libXau.so.6 (0x4875f000)
        libXdmcp.so.6 => /usr/local/lib/libXdmcp.so.6 (0x48762000)
        libpthread-stubs.so.0 => /usr/local/lib/libpthread-stubs.so.0 (0x48767000)
        librpcsvc.so.5 => /usr/lib/librpcsvc.so.5 (0x48772000)
        libgthread-2.0.so.0 => /usr/local/lib/libgthread-2.0.so.0 (0x4877a000)
        libpcre.so.1 => /usr/local/lib/libpcre.so.1 (0x4877e000)

NO_GUI=yes
$ldd vim
vim:
        libm.so.5 => /lib/libm.so.5 (0x481ec000)
        libncurses.so.8 => /lib/libncurses.so.8 (0x48205000)
        libiconv.so.3 => /usr/local/lib/libiconv.so.3 (0x48243000)
        libc.so.7 => /lib/libc.so.7 (0x48321000)


--
Adios
